title: Dronebox
description: A mod that adds drones to minecraft created for modfest: toybox
body:
#
DroneBox

Dronebox is a mod that adds drones for the modding event Modfest: Toybox

This mod has multiple accessories to allow players to give their drones amazing new features to allow for revamping the player's gameplay like:

Lamps, fireworks as boosters, googly eyes and even more amazing accessories you can find while playing the mod

##
Features
this mod features
Controllers: to allow more precise control of drones
Remotes: to allow you to target a specific location and make the drones move towards it
Lua pendrives: allowing you to control drones with Lua
Drones: the drones themselves require the other items to be controlled but are still amazing nontheless

##
Lua Support
This mod features Lua support to program drones in unique ways. We would love to see what you come up with
##
Modfest: Toybox
This mod was created for Modfest: Toybox where our team decided to go for a drone based mod.

We are so excited to bring this mod to live and hope people will love this mod



thanks so much for taking the time to look at our mod page
